zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Cobham於大約1316年出生在英國肯特可巴姆時，他的父親John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham32歲，母親Joan Beauchamp19歲。他於大約1332年與Margaret Courtenay the elder結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1408年1月10日在他的家鄉享年93歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Cobham于大约1316年出生在英国肯特可巴姆时，他的父亲John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham32岁，母亲Joan Beauchamp19岁。他于大约1332年与Margaret Courtenay the elder结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1408年1月10日在他的家乡享年93岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Cobham was born about 1316, in Cobham, Kent, England, his father, John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham, was 32 and his mother, Joan Beauchamp, was 19. He married Margaret Courtenay the elder about 1332. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 10 January 1408, in his hometown, at the age of 93, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Cobham est né environ 1316, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Beauchamp, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Courtenay the elder environ 1332. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1408, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Cobham um 1316 in Cobham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham 32 und seine Mutter Joan Beauchamp 19. Er hat um 1332 Margaret Courtenay the elder geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1408 im Alter von 93 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cobham è nato il circa 1316 nel Cobham, Kent, England, il suo padre, John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan Beauchamp, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Courtenay the elder circa 1332. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 10 gennaio 1408, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.Chrishall, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスチリシャル
ja.Cobham, Kent, England: イギリスケントコブハム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cobhamが約1316年にイギリスケントコブハムで生まれた時，父John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobhamは32歳，母Joan Beauchampは19歳であった。約1332年にMargaret Courtenay the elderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1408年1月10日に故郷で93歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cobham(이)가 대략 1316년 영국 켄트 컵함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Beauchamp(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1332년 Margaret Courtenay the elder(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1408년 1월 10일 그의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cobham nasceu aproximadamente 1316, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Beauchamp, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Courtenay the elder aproximadamente 1332. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1408, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Cobham родился около 1316 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Beauchamp, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Courtenay the elder около 1332 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 10 января 1408 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Cobham nació aproximadamente 1316, en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Beauchamp, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margaret Courtenay the elder aproximadamente 1332. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 10 de enero de 1408, en su pueblo, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
